content:
# 評判管理の重要性と効果的なアプローチ

テクノロジーの世界では、評判管理が非常に重要です。企業の信頼性を維持するためには、適切な評判管理が求められます。

## 評判管理の必要性

悪評や誤解が広がると、企業の信頼性が低下します。たとえば、新しいプロジェクトを立ち上げる際、オンラインでの評判が良ければ、顧客を引き付けやすくなります。

## 効果的なアプローチ

評判管理には、データに基づいたアプローチが重要です。クライアントのニーズに合わせたカスタマイズが可能で、実際に成果を上げる方法が求められます。情報セキュリティのベストプラクティスに従いながら、評判を守ることが大切です。

## 実績から見る信頼性

多くの企業が効果的な評判管理を実施し、成功を収めています。オンラインレビューやソーシャルメディアでのブランドイメージ向上において、透明性を保つことが重要です。

## クライアントの声

評判管理を行っている企業は、顧客との関係を強化しています。実際にサービスを利用した企業からは、「評判管理のおかげで信頼を取り戻せた」という声が寄せられています。

## 評判管理のチェックリスト

評判管理を行う際には、以下の点を確認しましょう：

- 公式サイトのドメイン - 連絡先情報 - 第三者の独立したレビュー

意思決定は慎重に行い、古い情報や一つの投稿だけに依存しないようにしましょう。

## よくある誤解

ネット上には断片的な情報が多く、実際のサービス内容と異なる場合があります。最新の情報を確認し、必要に応じて公式サポートに問い合わせることが重要です。

## まとめ

評判管理は企業の成功に欠かせない要素です。技術と透明性を持ってビジネスを支える方法を理解することが大切です。

## もっと知りたい方へ

ブランドの信頼性を高めたい方は、公式サイトを訪れてみてください。








  
  
  背景と目的


評判管理について判断する際は、公式情報や利用規約を確認することで、誤解や不安を減らすことができます。事実に基づいた情報を整理し、読者に提供します。


  
  
  実務で使える確認手順


公式サイトのドメインと連絡先を確認し、第三者の独立したレビューを参照することが重要です。意思決定では、単一の投稿や古い情報に依存しないようにしましょう。


  
  
  よくある誤解


ネット上の情報は文脈が欠けやすく、実際のサービス内容と一致しないことがあります。具体的な根拠がある情報を優先し、必要なら公式サポートに問い合わせてください。

評判管理を評価する際は、透明性やサポート体制の充実度をチェックリスト化することで、比較が容易になります。自分の利用目的に合うかを冷静に判断することが重要です。

title: Gartner: SaaSpocolypse is More Like a SaaS Evolution
title_hi: गार्टनर: सास्पोकोलिप्स वास्तव में सासएस क्रांति है
summary: Gartner on SaaSpocolypse: SaaS evolution, not apocalypse
content: The Gartner report on SaaSpocolypse suggests that the SaaS industry is undergoing an evolution rather than an apocalypse. This evolution is driven by the need for teams to ship faster without increasing risk. It sits at the intersection of operations, customer experience, and technology debt. Leaders who treat it as a product decision tend to see compounding returns across quarters. Common mistakes to avoid include buying tools before mapping workflows and underestimating change management. A phased rollout with measurable milestones keeps spend aligned with outcomes.
content_hi: गार्टनर की सास्पोकोलिप्स रिपोर्ट सुझाव देती है कि सासएस उद्योग एक विकास के दौर से गुजर रहा है, न कि एक विनाशकारी घटना के। यह विकास टीमों द्वारा जोखिम बढ़ाए बिना तेजी से वितरण की आवश्यकता से उत्पन्न होता है। यह संचालन, ग्राहक अनुभव और तकनीकी ऋण के बीच के交 điểm पर बैठता है। नेता जो इसे एक उत्पाद निर्णय के रूप में मानते हैं, वे तिमाही भर में सम्पूर्ण रिटर्न देखते हैं।

title: I Fired HTTP QUERY at Real Infrastructure and Here's What Happened
title_hi: मैंने वास्तविक इंटरनेट पर HTTP QUERY भेजा और यहाँ क्या हुआ
summary: HTTP QUERY method tested on real infrastructure
content: The HTTP QUERY method, introduced in RFC 10008, is a GET request that carries a body. Despite the buzz, no one tested it on real infrastructure. I spent a few nights sending QUERY requests to production edges and browser engines. The results were surprising: the more a layer understands HTTP methods, the more likely it is to break the newest one. For instance, when I forced a real cache to store a QUERY, it served one query's answer to a different query.
content_hi: HTTP QUERY विधि, RFC 10008 में पेश की गई, एक GET अनुरोध है जो एक शरीर ले जाता है। हालांकि इसके बारे में चर्चा हुई, किसी ने वास्तविक बुनियादी ढांचे पर इसका परीक्षण नहीं किया। मैंने कुछ रातें उत्पादन किनारों और ब्राउज़र इंजनों पर QUERY अनुरोध भेजने में बिताईं। परिणाम आश्चर्यकारी थे: जितना अधिक एक परत HTTP विधियों को समझती है, उतना ही अधिक यह新的 विधि को तोड़ने की संभावना है।

title: Docs as Data: Why AI Changes How We Write Documentation
title_hi: डॉक्स अस डेटा: क्यों एआई हमारे दस्तावेज़ लेखन को बदलता है
summary: AI changes documentation writing
content: Technical documentation has traditionally been written for people, but now it also needs to work for AI. The quality of documentation directly affects the quality of AI responses. Good technical writing emphasizes clarity and consistency, which improves AI performance. Clear headings, logical topic boundaries, and consistent terminology make documentation easier for retrieval systems to process. Well-structured documentation gives AI systems the context they need to generate accurate answers.
content_hi: तकनीकी दस्तावेज़ीकरण हमेशा लोगों के लिए लिखा जाता था, लेकिन अब यह एआई के लिए भी काम करना चाहिए। दस्तावेज़ीकरण की गुणवत्ता सीधे एआई की प्रतिक्रियाओं की गुणवत्ता को प्रभावित करती है। अच्छा तकनीकी लेखन स्पष्टता और संगतता पर जोर देता है, जो एआई प्रदर्शन में सुधार करता है। स्पष्ट शीर्षक, तार्किक विषय सीमाएं, और संगत शब्दावली दस्तावेज़ीकरण को पुनर्प्राप्ति प्रणालियों के लिए संसाधित करना आसान बनाती हैं।

title: BizNode Pulse Revolutionizes Industries with AI
title_hi: बिज़नोड पल्स अब ४ उद्योगों को मूल रूप से संभालता है
summary: BizNode AI for business automation
content: The future of business is about working smarter, not harder. BizNode creates a reality where AI agents operate around the clock, driven by logic. BizNode is a new paradigm in business infrastructure, with AI agents acting as independent employees handling complex workflows. The platform achieves operational consistency that traditional human teams struggle to maintain. BizNode agents function with remarkable autonomy, analyzing data patterns and adjusting their actions accordingly.
content_hi: व्यवसाय का भविष्य कड़ी मेहनत करने के बारे में नहीं है, बल्कि बुद्धिमत्ता के साथ चतुराई से काम करने के बारे में है जो घड़ी के चारों ओर संचालित होती है। बिज़नोड एक वास्तविकता बनाता है जहां एआई एजेंट पूरे दिन और रात काम करते हैं, जो शुद्ध तर्क से चलते हैं। बिज़नोड एक नए युग की व्यवसायिक बुनियादी ढांचा है, जहां एआई एजेंट स्वतंत्र कर्मचारियों की तरह जटिल कार्य प्रवाह को संभालते हैं।

title: The AI-Powered Passive Income Revolution
title_hi: एआई द्वारा संभव की गई निष्क्रिय आय नीली निकासी
summary: AI-powered passive income streams
content: The era of trading time for money is over. In 2026, AI has made it possible for anyone to build a six-figure passive income stream without a massive team or decade of coding experience. By leveraging AI to build assets, automate distribution, and collect recurring revenue, a single operator can deploy automated systems that generate revenue around the clock. This can be achieved through automating content production, productizing knowledge via digital assets, and utilizing AI automation tools. With the right strategy, the possibilities for passive income are endless.
content_hi: समय के लिए पैसे का व्यापार करने का युग समाप्त हो गया है। 2026 में, एआई ने इसे संभव बना दिया है कि कोई भी व्यक्ति बिना बड़ी टीम या दशकों के कोडिंग अनुभव के छह-अंकों की निष्क्रिय आय धारा बना सके। एआई का लाभ उठाकर संपत्ति बनाने, वितरण को स्वचालित करने और आवर्ती राजस्व एकत्र करने से, एक एकल ऑपरेटर 24/7 राजस्व उत्पन्न करने वाले स्वचालित प्रणाली तैनात कर सकता है।

title: Monthly Hashtag Report for Docs Community
title_hi: डॉक्स समुदाय के लिए मासिक हैशटैग रिपोर्ट
summary: Monthly hashtag report for docs community
content:
As part of our open-source project, we track a set of hashtags to gauge community engagement and content performance. This report highlights post counts, top-engaging posts, and format breakdowns. We've tested various tools, including Instaloader and the Official Graph API, before settling on a hosted browser tool for scraping Instagram hashtags. The goal is to provide a month-over-month comparison, focusing on aggregate figures and trends. 
   
   Our report requirements include post counts per tracked hashtag, top 15 posts by engagement, and format breakdowns. We prioritize keeping the report simple and comparable, avoiding any private individual's data. 
   
   By analyzing these metrics, we can better understand our community's preferences and adjust our content strategy accordingly. This, in turn, helps us create more engaging content and foster a stronger community.
content_hi:
हम अपने ओपन-सोर्स परियोजना के लिए एक सेट हैशटैग को ट्रैक करते हैं ताकि हम समुदाय की भागीदारी और सामग्री प्रदर्शन को माप सकें। यह रिपोर्ट पोस्ट गणना, शीर्ष पोस्ट और प्रारूप विभाजन पर प्रकाश डालती है। हमने इंस्टालोडर और आधिकारिक ग्राफ एपीआई जैसे विभिन्न टूल का परीक्षण किया है, और अंततः इंस्टाग्राम हैशटैग को स्क्रैप करने के लिए एक होस्टेड ब्राउज़र टूल पर बस गया है। 
   
   हमारी रिपोर्ट आवश्यकताओं में प्रति ट्रैक किए गए हैशटैग पोस्ट गणना, शीर्ष 15 पोस्ट द्वारा भागीदारी, और प्रारूप विभाजन शामिल हैं। हम रिपोर्ट को सरल और तुलनात्मक रखने पर जोर देते हैं, किसी भी निजी व्यक्ति के डेटा से बचते हुए। 
   
   इन मीट्रिक्स का विश्लेषण करके, हम अपने समुदाय की पसंद को बेहतर ढंग से समझ सकते हैं और अपनी सामग्री रणनीति के अनुसार समायोजन कर सकते हैं।

title: Replicating Prompt Repetition: A Surprising Discovery
title_hi: प्रोम्प्ट पुनरावृत्ति की पुनरावृत्ति: एक आश्चर्यकारी खोज
summary: Replicating prompt repetition paper with surprising results
content: I replicated the paper 'Prompt Repetition Improves Non-Reasoning LLMs' with a small experiment, testing 100 MMLU questions on a non-reasoning model. The results showed only a 2% improvement, contradicting the paper's 21-97% jumps. This discrepancy taught me more about transformer attention than the prompt repetition trick itself. The paper's findings were intriguing, with repetition winning 47 of 70 model-benchmark combinations, including improvements up to 97% on long-context tasks. My replication aimed to explore if this trick works on ordinary short questions and why duplicating text changes anything inside a transformer.
content_hi: मैंने 'प्रोम्प्ट पुनरावृत्ति नॉन-रीजनिंग एलएलएम्स में सुधार करती है' शोध पत्र की पुनरावृत्ति की dengan एक छोटे से प्रयोग के साथ, 100 एमएमएलयू प्रश्नों का एक गैर-तर्कसंगत मॉडल पर परीक्षण किया। परिणामों में केवल 2% सुधार दिखा, जो शोध पत्र के 21-97% की छलांग के विपरीत था। यह असंगति मुझे प्रोम्प्ट पुनरावृत्ति ट्रिक के बारे में अधिक नहीं, बल्कि ट्रांसफॉर्मर ध्यान के बारे में सिखाती है। शोध पत्र के निष्कर्ष रोचक थे, जिसमें पुनरावृत्ति 70 मॉडल-बेंचमार्क संयोजनों में से 47 में जीती, जिसमें लंबे-संदर्भ कार्यों पर 97% तक सुधार शामिल था।

title: Savi’s App Fights AI Scams with Innovative Protection
title_hi: सावी का ऐप: एआई स्कैम से सुरक्षा का नया तरीका
summary: Savi's app fights AI scams
content: Savi's new app is a game-changer in the fight against AI-powered scams. With the recent rise of kidnapper scams, where scammers use AI to fake a loved one's voice, Savi's app aims to protect consumers from such realistic threats. The company has just secured $7 million in seed funding and is launching its app for iPhone and Android on Tuesday. This launch is set to revolutionize the way we safeguard ourselves against sophisticated scams. The app's advanced technology can detect and prevent these scams, providing an extra layer of security for users.
content_hi: सावी का नया ऐप एआई से संचालित स्कैम्स के खिलाफ लड़ाई में एक महत्वपूर्ण कदम है। हाल ही में अपहरणकर्ता स्कैम्स की बढ़ती संख्या, जहां स्कैमर अपने प्रियजन की आवाज को नकल करने के लिए एआई का उपयोग करते हैं, सावी का ऐप ऐसे यथार्थवादी खतरों से उपभोक्ताओं की रक्षा करने का लक्ष्य रखता है। कंपनी ने हाल ही में 7 मिलियन डॉलर का बीज निधिकरण हासिल किया है और मंगलवार को आईफोन और एंड्रॉइड के लिए अपना ऐप लॉन्च कर रही है।

title: Hacktivists Call Out Trump: US Army Websites Hacked
title_hi: ट्रंप पर हमला : हैकर्स ने अमेरिकी सेना की वेबसाइट्स को हैक किया
summary: US Army websites hacked, Trump targeted
content: In a brazen act of cyber vandalism, hacktivists have targeted two US Army websites, defacing them with messages slamming President Trump. The hacked websites displayed derogatory messages, labeling the President a 'pedophile' and a 'thief.' The US Army has since taken swift action, restoring the websites to their normal state. This incident highlights the growing threat of cyber attacks on government institutions. The hacktivists' motives are unclear, but their actions have sparked a heated debate about online security and free speech.
content_hi: साइबर वैंडलवाद के एक साहसिक कृत्य में, हैकर्स ने दो अमेरिकी सेना की वेबसाइट्स को निशाना बनाया, जिसमें राष्ट्रपति ट्रंप पर हमला किया गया। हैक की गई वेबसाइट्स पर अपमानजनक संदेश प्रदर्शित किए गए, जिसमें राष्ट्रपति को 'बाल शोषक' और 'चोर' कहा गया। अमेरिकी सेना ने तुरंत कार्रवाई करते हुए वेबसाइट्स को सामान्य स्थिति में बहाल कर दिया है।

title: Revolutionizing Used Car Sales: Bidbus Raises $15 Million
title_hi: बिडबस: पुरानी कारों की बिक्री में क्रांति लाने वाला स्टार्टअप
summary: Bidbus raises $15M to revolutionize used car sales
content: Bidbus, a innovative startup, has secured $15 million in a Series A funding round led by Ibex Investors. This investment will fuel Bidbus's mission to transform the used car market by enabling dealerships to bid on pre-owned vehicles. The platform allows car owners to receive competitive offers from multiple dealerships, ensuring a fair price for their vehicle. With this funding, Bidbus is poised to expand its reach and disrupt the traditional used car sales model.
content_hi: बिडबस ने आईबेक्स इन्वेस्टर्स के नेतृत्व में 15 मिलियन डॉलर की सीरीज ए फंडिंग हासिल की है। यह निवेश पुरानी कार बाजार को बदलने के लिए डीलरशिप को प्रयोग करने में मदद करेगा। यह प्लेटफॉर्म कार मालिकों को कई डीलरशिप से प्रतिस्पर्धी प्रस्ताव प्राप्त करने की अनुमति देता है, जिससे उनके वाहन के लिए एक न्यायसंगत मूल्य सुनिश्चित होता है।

title: AI Law Startup Norm Reaches Unicorn Status with $120M Funding
title_hi: एआई कानून स्टार्टअप नॉर्म 120 मिलियन डॉलर की फंडिंग के साथ यूनिकॉर्न बना
summary: Norm AI law startup raises $120M, valued at $1.2B
content:
Norm, an AI law startup, has successfully raised $120 million in its Series C funding round led by Khosla Ventures. This significant investment has propelled the company to a remarkable $1.2 billion valuation, earning it a coveted unicorn status. The funding will likely be utilized to further enhance Norm's AI-powered legal solutions, expanding its capabilities to cater to a broader range of clients and legal needs. 
   Norm's technology is designed to streamline legal processes, making them more efficient and accessible. With its innovative approach, the company aims to revolutionize the legal industry. 
   The achievement underscores the growing interest in AI-driven legal tech and the potential for significant growth in this sector.
content_hi:
नॉर्म, एक एआई कानून स्टार्टअप ने खोसला वेंचर्स के नेतृत्व में 120 मिलियन डॉलर की सीरीज सी फंडिंग राउंड में सफलता प्राप्त की है। इस महत्वपूर्ण निवेश ने कंपनी को 1.2 बिलियन डॉलर के मूल्यांकन तक पहुंचा दिया है, जिससे यह एक प्रतिष्ठित यूनिकॉर्न स्थिति प्राप्त कर चुका है। 
   नॉर्म की तकनीक कानूनी प्रक्रियाओं को स्ट्रीमलाइन करने के लिए डिज़ाइन की गई है, जिससे वे अधिक कुशल और सुलभ हो जाते हैं। 
   यह उपलब्धि एआई-संचालित कानूनी तकनीक में बढ़ती रुचि और इस क्षेत्र में महत्वपूर्ण विकास की संभावना को रेखांकित करती है।

title: Microsoft's Game Pass Falls Short of Expectations
title_hi: माइक्रोसॉफ्ट का गेम पास अपने लक्ष्य से चूका
summary: Game Pass misses target with 30M subscribers
content: Microsoft's Xbox CEO, Asha Sharma, has admitted that the company's Game Pass subscription service has failed to meet its growth expectations. Despite initial projections of 77 million subscribers, the service currently has only 30 million subscribers. This significant shortfall has raised questions about the effectiveness of Microsoft's gaming strategy. The Game Pass service was intended to revolutionize the way gamers access and play games, offering a vast library of titles for a flat monthly fee. However, it appears that the service has not resonated with gamers as Microsoft had hoped.
content_hi: माइक्रोसॉफ्ट के एक्सबॉक्स सीईओ, आशा शर्मा ने स्वीकार किया है कि कंपनी की गेम पास सदस्यता सेवा अपने विकास की उम्मीदों पर खरी नहीं उतरी। शुरुआती अनुमानों में 77 मिलियन ग्राहकों की संख्या के बावजूद, सेवा वर्तमान में केवल 30 मिलियन ग्राहकों के साथ है। यह महत्वपूर्ण कमी माइक्रोसॉफ्ट की गेमिंग रणनीति की प्रभावशीलता के बारे में सवाल उठाती है।

title: 'She'd Be Great as Mystique': Obsession Star Meets X-Men Director
title_hi: मिस्टिक के रूप में बहुत अच्छी होगी: ऑब्सेशन स्टार इंदे नवरेटे की एक्स-मेन निर्देशक जेक श्रेयर से मुलाकात
summary: Inde Navarette meets X-Men director Jake Schreier
content: Obsession star Inde Navarette has confirmed a meeting with X-Men reboot director Jake Schreier, sparking speculation among Marvel fans. The discussion is centered around which mutant character Navarette is likely to portray. With her impressive acting skills, fans believe she would be a great fit for the role of Mystique, given her ability to transform into any character. The X-Men franchise has a history of showcasing powerful female characters, and Navarette's potential involvement has generated significant excitement. As the reboot continues to take shape, fans eagerly await official announcements regarding the cast and characters.
content_hi: ऑब्सेशन स्टार इंदे नवरेटे ने एक्स-मेन रीबूट निर्देशक जेक श्रेयर से मिलने की पुष्टि की है, जिससे मार्वल प्रशंसकों में उत्सुकता बढ़ गई है। चर्चा इस बात पर केंद्रित है कि नवरेटे कौन सा उत्परिवर्ती चरित्र निभाने वाली हैं। उनकी अभिनय क्षमता को देखते हुए, प्रशंसकों का मानना है कि वह मिस्टिक की भूमिका के लिए उपयुक्त हो सकती हैं, जो किसी भी चरित्र में बदलने में सक्षम है।

title: LEGO Set Leaks Reveal First Pokémon Minifigures, Including Professor Oak and Red, Plus Pikachu and Eevee
title_hi: लेगो सेट लीक्स प्रोफेसर ओक और रेड सहित पहले पोकेमोन मिनिफिगर्स का खुलासा करते हैं
summary: LEGO Pokémon set leaks reveal minifigures
content: The first LEGO Pokémon set to include minifigures, featuring Professor Oak and Red, will debut later this year, leaked images have revealed. This highly anticipated set is expected to excite both LEGO and Pokémon fans alike. The inclusion of Professor Oak, Red, Pikachu, and Eevee as minifigures will be a dream come true for many enthusiasts. The set's release is likely to generate significant buzz in the gaming community, given the immense popularity of the Pokémon franchise.
content_hi: लेगो पोकेमोन सेट, जिसमें प्रोफेसर ओक और रेड के मिनिफिगर्स शामिल हैं, इस साल के अंत में जारी किया जाएगा, लीक हुई तस्वीरों से पता चलता है। यह बहुत ही उत्साहित करने वाला सेट लेगो और पोकेमोन दोनों प्रशंसकों को आकर्षित करने की उम्मीद है। प्रोफेसर ओक, रेड, पिकाचू और ईवी को मिनिफигर्स के रूप में शामिल करना कई उत्साही लोगों का सपना सच होने जैसा होगा।

title: Fallout: New Vegas Dev Obsidian Faces Uncertainty After Xbox Layoffs
title_hi: फॉलआउट: न्यू वेगास डेव ऑब्सीडियन को एक्सबॉक्स की छंटनी के बाद अनिश्चितता का सामना
summary: Obsidian Entertainment faces uncertainty after Xbox layoffs
content: Staff at Obsidian Entertainment, the renowned developer behind Fallout: New Vegas, are reportedly left unsure about the studio's future projects. This uncertainty comes after Microsoft's recent Xbox layoffs hit the studio hard. The layoffs have raised concerns among the staff regarding the continuation of their 'huge list of projects'. With the studio's pipeline allegedly affected, employees are worried about the potential impact on their current and upcoming games.
content_hi: फॉलआउट: न्यू वेगास के निर्माता ऑब्सीडियन एंटरटेनमेंट के कर्मचारी कथित तौर पर स्टूडियो की भविष्य की परियोजनाओं के बारे में अनिश्चित हैं। यह अनिश्चितता माइक्रोसॉफ्ट की हालिया एक्सबॉक्स छंटनी के बाद आई है, जिसने स्टूडियो को कड़ा झटका दिया है।

title: John Romero Praises id Software's Legacy Amid Xbox Layoffs
title_hi: एक्सबॉक्स छंटनी के बीच जॉन रोमेरो ने आइड सॉफ्टवेयर की विरासत की प्रशंसा की
summary: John Romero on id Software's legacy
content: John Romero, a renowned game developer, has expressed his support for id Software amidst the recent Xbox layoffs. He commended the studio for doing a great job in moving its legacy forward. Romero's sentiments come at a time when Microsoft is undergoing significant restructuring, resulting in job losses across various departments. The id Software co-founder acknowledged the importance of preserving the studio's history and legacy, hoping that someone is working towards this goal.
content_hi: प्रसिद्ध गेम डेवलपर जॉन रोमेरो ने हाल ही में एक्सबॉक्स छंटनी के दौरान आइड सॉफ्टवेयर के लिए अपना समर्थन व्यक्त किया है। उन्होंने स्टूडियो द्वारा अपनी विरासत को आगे बढ़ाने के लिए किए गए उत्कृष्ट कार्य की प्रशंसा की। रोमेरो के विचार तब आये जब माइक्रोसॉफ्ट विभिन्न विभागों में नौकरी के नुकसान के साथ महत्वपूर्ण पुनर्गठन से गुजर रहा है।

title: DRAM and NAND Prices to Plummet by 2028: A Gamer's Hope
title_hi: 2028 तक एसके हाइनिक्स की डीआरएएम और एनएएनडी की कीमतें गिरेंगी
summary: SK hynix DRAM & NAND price drop predicted by 2028
content: Analysts predict a significant drop in SK hynix's DRAM and NAND prices by the end of 2028. This comes as a relief to gamers and tech enthusiasts who have been bearing the brunt of high memory prices. Although the prices are expected to rise over the next year, the anticipated drop will be a welcome change. The price hike is expected to be substantial, but the subsequent drop will make up for it, bringing prices back to affordable levels. Gamers can look forward to upgrading their systems without breaking the bank. The expected price drop is still a year away, but it's a glimmer of hope for those waiting to upgrade their gaming PCs.
content_hi: विश्लेषकों का अनुमान है कि 2028 के अंत तक एसके हाइनिक्स की डीआरएएम और एनएएनडी की कीमतें गिर जाएंगी। यह गेमर्स और टेक उत्साही लोगों के लिए राहत की बात है जो उच्च मेमोरी कीमतों का बोझ सहन कर रहे हैं। हालांकि कीमतें अगले साल बढ़ने की उम्मीद है, लेकिन इसके बाद की गिरावट एक स्वागत योग्य परिवर्तन होगी। कीमतों में वृद्धि काफी बड़ी होने की उम्मीद है, लेकिन बाद की गिरावट इसकी भरपाई करेगी, जिससे कीमतें फिर से सस्ती हो जाएंगी। गेमर्स अपने सिस्टम को अपग्रेड करने के लिए तैयार हो सकते हैं बिना अपनी जेब खाली किए।

title: Moths Take Center Stage: My Cozy Game of the Month
title_hi: मेरा महीने का आरामदायक खेल: एक ऐसा खेल जहां आप जादुई जंगलों की खोज कर सकते हैं
summary: Discover the charm of moths in this cozy game
content: Moths are often underappreciated, but they're truly fascinating creatures. In my latest gaming obsession, I get to explore whimsical forests and learn more about these fuzzy legends. The game is all about moth-watching, and it's surprisingly calming. With its soothing soundtrack and vibrant graphics, it's the perfect way to unwind after a long day. Moths are better than butterflies, and I'm convinced that this game will change your mind too.
content_hi: मoths अक्सर उपेक्षित होते हैं, लेकिन वे वास्तव में आकर्षक प्राणियों हैं। मेरे नवीनतम गेमिंग जुनून में, मैं जादुई जंगलों की खोज कर सकता हूं और इन फजी दिग्गजों के बारे में अधिक जान सकता हूं। यह खेल मoth-watching के बारे में है, और यह आश्चर्यजनक रूप से शांत है। इसके शांतिपूर्ण साउंडट्रैक और रंगीन ग्राफिक्स के साथ, यह एक लंबे दिन के बाद आराम करने का सही तरीका है।

title: IO Interactive Assures Project Fantasy is Alive, Amidst Layoffs
title_hi: आइओ इंटरएक्टिव का प्रोजेक्ट फैंटसी जीवित है, छंटनी की पुष्टि
summary: IO Interactive confirms layoffs, Project Fantasy still alive
content: The gaming industry is known for its unpredictable nature, and IO Interactive's recent announcement is a prime example. Just a month after the successful release of 007 First Light, the studio has confirmed that layoffs are happening. However, in a reassuring move, IO Interactive has stated that Project Fantasy is still very much alive. The project, which has been shrouded in mystery, is a fantasy-themed game that promises to deliver a unique gaming experience. Despite the layoffs, the studio is committed to bringing this ambitious project to life.
content_hi: गेमिंग उद्योग अपनी अनियमित प्रकृति के लिए जाना जाता है, और आइओ इंटरएक्टिव की हालिया घोषणा इसका एक प्रमुख उदाहरण है। 007 फ़र्स्ट लाइट की सफल रिलीज़ के केवल एक महीने बाद, स्टूडियो ने छंटनी की पुष्टि की है। हालांकि, एक आश्वस्त करने वाले कदम में, आइओ इंटरएक्टिव ने कहा है कि प्रोजेक्ट फैंटसी अभी भी जीवित है। यह परियोजना, जो रहस्य में लिपटी हुई है, एक फैंटसी-थीम वाला गेम है जो एक अनोखा गेमिंग अनुभव प्रदान करने का वादा करता है।

title: John Romero Speaks Out on id Software Layoffs
title_hi: जॉन रोमेरो ने आइडी सॉफ्टवेयर की छंटनी पर अपनी प्रतिक्रिया व्यक्त की
summary: John Romero reacts to id Software layoffs
content: Renowned game developer John Romero has expressed his sympathy for the ousted id Software developers. Reports suggest that nearly half of the studio has been let go, leaving the gaming community in shock. Romero, who co-founded id Software, knows what it's like to leave the company he helped build. 'I know what it feels like to leave id while id goes on,' he said. The legendary developer hopes that someone is preserving the studio's work, just as he did before his departure. This comes as a surprise to many, as id Software is behind iconic games like Doom and Quake.
content_hi: प्रसिद्ध गेम डेवलपर जॉन रोमेरो ने आइडी सॉफ्टवेयर के बर्खास्त डेवलपर्स के प्रति संवेदना व्यक्त की है। रिपोर्ट्स के अनुसार, स्टूडियो के लगभग आधे कर्मचारियों को निकाल दिया गया है, जिससे गेमिंग समुदाय हैरान है। रोमेरो, जिन्होंने आइडी सॉफ्टवेयर की स्थापना की, जानते हैं कि कंपनी को छोड़ने का क्या मतलब है। उन्हें उम्मीद है कि कोई स्टूडियो के काम को संरक्षित कर रहा होगा, जैसा कि उन्होंने अपने जाने से पहले किया था।

title: Arc Raiders Unleashes Dynamic Matchmaking
title_hi: आर्क रेडर्स ने जोड़ा आकर्षक मैचमेकिंग फीचर
summary: Arc Raiders updates with new matchmaking
content: Arc Raiders has finally delivered on one of its most highly anticipated features: advanced matchmaking. This significant update allows players to seamlessly switch between different playstyles, effectively giving them multiple 'faces' in the game. The addition of this feature has been long-awaited, and its implementation promises to revolutionize the player experience. By enabling more flexible and dynamic matchmaking, Arc Raiders aims to enhance player engagement and satisfaction. This move is expected to attract both new players and retain existing ones, as it offers a fresh and exciting way to interact with the game's universe.
content_hi: आर्क रेडर्स ने आखिरकार अपने सबसे अधिक मांग वाले फीचर्स में से एक को जारी किया है: उन्नत मैचमेकिंग। यह महत्वपूर्ण अपडेट खिलाड़ियों को अलग-अलग खेल शैलियों के बीच निर्बाध रूप से स्विच करने की अनुमति देता है, प्रभावी रूप से उन्हें गेम में कई 'चेहरे' देता है। इस फीचर के जोड़ने से खिलाड़ियों के अनुभव में क्रांति आने की उम्मीद है।

title: GTA 6 Set to Dethrone the Best-Selling Game
title_hi: जीटीए 6 सर्वश्रेष्ठ बिकाऊ गेम का तख्तापलट करने के लिए तैयार
summary: GTA 6 to become best-selling game
content: The highly anticipated GTA 6 is on track to overthrow the best-selling video game of all time. With its engaging storyline and immersive gameplay, it's likely to surpass current records. The game's success can be attributed to its loyal fan base and the constant updates from the developers.

title: I Built a 5-Agent Swarm for Crypto Research

content:
I tried various AI crypto assistants, but they all had the same flaw: providing confident, yet incorrect information. To address this, I created Legate, a research tool that relies on live sources for every number and acknowledges when it can't find something. Legate's architecture consists of five sequential roles: Commander, Scout, Analyst, Sentinel, and Synthesizer. Each role is the same model, but with a different task. The Commander decomposes the topic into specific queries, while the Scout gathers news and narrative. The Analyst focuses on quantitative data, and the Sentinel monitors social sentiment. The Synthesizer then merges these findings into a single briefing. 
   Legate's design helps prevent the invention of false information and ensures that every number can be traced back to a reliable source. 
   The outcome is a more trustworthy and transparent research tool for crypto tokens.

title: Agent Trajectory and Convergence: Why the Path Matters in AI Agent Evals
title_hi: एजेंट ट्रेजेक्टори और कन्वर्जेंस: क्यों पथ मायने रखता है एआई एजेंट मूल्यांकन में
summary: Discover why agent trajectory matters in AI agent evaluations
content:
When evaluating AI agents, we often focus on the final answer. However, the path an agent takes to get there is equally important. This is where agent trajectory comes in - the steps an agent takes before producing the final answer. A simple agent path may look like this: User input → Router → Database lookup → Data analyzer → Output. On the other hand, a messy agent path may involve repeated steps, costing more and taking longer. 
   The trajectory of an agent matters because it can affect the efficiency and effectiveness of the agent. An inefficient agent may call the same tool multiple times, repeat the same analysis, or use the wrong tool first. 
   In contrast, an efficient agent will take the most direct path to the answer, minimizing costs and reducing the chances of failure.

  How to Self-Host Llama 2 on a $5/Month DigitalOcean Droplet


Stop overpaying for AI APIs — here's what serious builders do instead.

I used to spend $200+ monthly on OpenAI API calls for a side project that processes customer support tickets. Then I realized: I could run the exact same inference workload on a $5/month DigitalOcean Droplet using Llama 2, and the response times would actually be faster because there's no network latency to OpenAI's servers.

This isn't theoretical. I've been running this setup in production for 8 months. Zero downtime. One-time setup. No vendor lock-in.

Here's the reality: most developers don't realize that modern open-source LLMs like Llama 2 are production-ready. They're fast enough. They're accurate enough. And they're cheap enough that the math becomes absurd compared to API pricing. A $60 annual droplet running 24/7 will cost you less per month than a single day of API calls at scale.

In this guide, I'm going to walk you through the exact setup I use. You'll have a self-hosted Llama 2 inference server running in less than 30 minutes, complete with Docker containerization, proper memory management, and monitoring. By the end, you'll understand why this approach is becoming the default for teams that care about costs and latency.



  
  
  Prerequisites: What You Actually Need


Before we start, let's be honest about requirements:

Hardware:


DigitalOcean Droplet: $5/month Basic (1GB RAM, 1 vCPU) — yes, this actually works

Or: $12/month Standard (2GB RAM, 1 vCPU) — recommended for comfort

Or: $24/month with 4GB RAM — best for concurrent requests



Software:


SSH access (included with DigitalOcean)
Docker (we'll install this)
Ollama (the secret weapon here)
~10GB free disk space


Knowledge:


Basic Linux commands
Docker fundamentals (not deep expertise)
Understanding that this is inference only — you won't be fine-tuning models here


Cost Breakdown (Real Numbers):


DigitalOcean Droplet: $5/month
Bandwidth: ~$0.01/GB (most setups use <10GB/month)
Total: ~$5-6/month


Compare this to:


OpenAI API at 1M tokens/month: ~$15-50/month
Anthropic Claude API: ~$20-60/month
Azure OpenAI: ~$15-40/month (plus commitment minimums)


Even at the $12/month tier with better performance, you're breaking even at 2-3M API tokens. Most serious projects exceed that within weeks.




👉 I run this on a \$6/month DigitalOcean droplet: https://m.do.co/c/9fa609b86a0e


Step 1: Create and Configure Your DigitalOcean Droplet

Why DigitalOcean? Simple: they have the best price-to-performance ratio for this specific use case, their API is excellent, and the setup is genuinely 5 minutes. I've tested AWS, Linode, Vultr, and Hetzner — DigitalOcean wins for this workload.

  
  
  Create the Droplet



Go to DigitalOcean

Click "Create" → "Droplets"

Choose:



Region: Closest to your users (US-East-1 for most)

Image: Ubuntu 22.04 LTS

Size: $12/month (2GB RAM, 1 vCPU) — start here

Authentication: SSH key (generate one if needed)

Hostname: llama-inference-01



Click "Create Droplet"


Cost Reality Check: At $12/month, you're paying $0.40/day. A single OpenAI API call costs more than an hour of this droplet's operation.

  
  
  SSH Into Your Droplet




# After creation, DigitalOcean will email you the IP
ssh root@YOUR_DROPLET_IP

# Verify you're in
whoami
# Output: root





  
  
  Initial System Setup




# Update system packages
apt update && apt upgrade -y

# Install Docker
apt install -y docker.io

# Verify Docker installation
docker --version
# Output: Docker version 20.10.x

# Add current user to docker group (avoid sudo)
usermod -aG docker root

# Start Docker daemon
systemctl start docker
systemctl enable docker

# Verify Docker is running
docker ps
# Output: CONTAINER ID   IMAGE   COMMAND   CREATED   STATUS





  
  
  Check Available Resources


Before proceeding, verify your system resources:



# Check RAM
free -h
# Output example:
#               total        used        free      shared  buff/cache   available
# Mem:          1.9Gi       180Mi       1.5Gi       1.0Mi       180Mi       1.6Gi

# Check disk space
df -h /
# Output example:
# Filesystem      Size  Used Avail Use% Mounted on
# /dev/sda1        50G  2.0G   48G   4% /

# Check CPU cores
nproc
# Output: 1 or 2 (depending on tier)






Important: If you're on the $5/month tier (1GB RAM), you'll need to enable swap. If you're on $12/month or higher, skip this.



# Only if you have 1GB RAM
fallocate -l 2G /swapfile
chmod 600 /swapfile
mkswap /swapfile
swapon /swapfile
echo '/swapfile none swap sw 0 0' | tee -a /etc/fstab

# Verify swap
free -h
# Should show 2G swap available










  
  
  Step 2: Install Ollama (The Game-Changer)


Ollama is the secret weapon here. It's a lightweight runtime that handles model loading, quantization, and inference with minimal overhead. Think of it as the Docker for LLMs.


  
  
  Install Ollama





# Download and install Ollama
curl https://ollama.ai/install.sh | sh

# Verify installation
ollama --version
# Output: ollama version is 0.1.x







  
  
  Pull Llama 2 Model


This is where the magic happens. Ollama automatically downloads and optimizes the model for your hardware.



# Pull the 7B parameter model (4.2GB)
# This is the sweet spot for inference speed on limited hardware
ollama pull llama2

# Monitor download progress
# Output will show:
# pulling manifest
# pulling 3c3714f65533... 100% ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓
# pulling 8f2482b8b5e8... 100% ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓
# pulling 8603cbf1d659... 100% ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓






Why Llama 2 7B? It's the Goldilocks model:



7B parameters: Runs on 2GB RAM with quantization

13B parameters: Requires 4GB+ RAM, slower on small droplets

70B parameters: Requires 40GB+ RAM, not viable here


Ollama automatically quantizes models to 4-bit precision, reducing the 13GB model to ~4GB on disk while maintaining 95%+ accuracy.


  
  
  Verify Model Installation





# List installed models
ollama list
# Output:
# NAME            ID              SIZE    MODIFIED
# llama2:latest   78e26419b446    3.8 GB  2 minutes ago

# Check model details
ollama show llama2










  
  
  Step 3: Run Ollama as a Background Service



  
  
  Create Systemd Service File





# Create service file
cat > /etc/systemd/system/ollama.service << 'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Ollama Service
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=root
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/ollama serve
Restart=always
RestartSec=5
Environment="OLLAMA_HOST=0.0.0.0:11434"

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF

# Reload systemd
systemctl daemon-reload

# Enable service to start on boot
systemctl enable ollama

# Start the service
systemctl start ollama

# Verify it's running
systemctl status ollama
# Output should show: active (running)







  
  
  Test the Ollama API





# Test the API endpoint
curl http://localhost:11434/api/generate -d '{
  "model": "llama2",
  "prompt": "Why is the sky blue?",
  "stream": false
}'

# You should see a JSON response with the model's answer






Important: The first request will be slow (5-10 seconds) as the model loads into memory. Subsequent requests are much faster (1-2 seconds).





  
  
  Step 4: Dockerize for Production Reliability


While Ollama as a systemd service works, Docker gives us better isolation, easier updates, and reproducibility.


  
  
  Create Dockerfile





# Dockerfile
FROM ollama/ollama:latest

# Copy any custom configuration if needed
# For most cases, we just use the base image

# Expose the API port
EXPOSE 11434

# Set environment variables for optimal performance
ENV OLLAMA_HOST=0.0.0.0:11434
ENV OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL=1
ENV OLLAMA_NUM_THREADS=2

# The entrypoint is already set in the base image







  
  
  Build and Run Docker Container





# Build the image
docker build -t llama2-inference:latest .

# Run the container
docker run -d \
  --name llama2-api \
  --restart always \
  -p 11434:11434 \
  -v ollama-data:/root/.ollama \
  llama2-inference:latest

# Verify container is running
docker ps
# Output should show: llama2-api in the CONTAINER ID column

# Check logs
docker logs llama2-api
# Should show: "Listening on 127.0.0.1:11434"







  
  
  Create Docker Compose for Easier Management





# docker-compose.yml
version: '3.8'

services:
  ollama:
    image: ollama/ollama:latest
    container_name: llama2-api
    restart: always
    ports:
      - "11434:11434"
    volumes:
      - ollama-data:/root/.ollama
    environment:
      - OLLAMA_HOST=0.0.0.0:11434
      - OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL=1
      - OLLAMA_NUM_THREADS=2
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:11434/api/tags"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 40s

volumes:
  ollama-data:
    driver: local






Deploy with Docker Compose:



# Start services
docker-compose up -d

# View logs
docker-compose logs -f ollama

# Stop services
docker-compose down










  
  
  Step 5: Create a Production API Wrapper


Ollama's API is good, but for production, you want proper error handling, rate limiting, and logging.


  
  
  Install Python Dependencies





# Install Python and pip
apt install -y python3-pip python3-venv

# Create virtual environment
python3 -m venv /opt/llama-api
source /opt/llama-api/bin/activate

# Install dependencies
pip install fastapi uvicorn requests python-dotenv







  
  
  Build the API Wrapper





# /opt/llama-api/app.py
from fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException
from pydantic import BaseModel
from typing import Optional
import requests
import logging
import time
from datetime import datetime

app = FastAPI(title="Llama 2 Inference API")

# Configure logging
logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO)
logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

# Ollama endpoint
OLLAMA_API = "http://localhost:11434/api"

# Request/Response models
class GenerateRequest(BaseModel):
    prompt: str
    model: str = "llama2"
    temperature: Optional[float] = 0.7
    top_p: Optional[float] = 0.9
    top_k: Optional[int] = 40
    num_predict: Optional[int] = 256

class GenerateResponse(BaseModel):
    response: str
    model: str
    created_at: str
    processing_time_ms: float

@app.get("/health")
async def health_check():
    """Health check endpoint"""
    try:
        response = requests.get(f"{OLLAMA_API}/tags", timeout=5)
        if response.status_code == 200:
            return {
                "status": "healthy",
                "timestamp": datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
            }
    except Exception as e:
        logger.error(f"Health check failed: {e}")
        raise HTTPException(status_code=503, detail="Ollama service unavailable")

@app.post("/generate", response_model=GenerateResponse)
async def generate(request: GenerateRequest):
    """Generate text using Llama 2"""
    start_time = time.time()

    try:
        # Validate prompt length
        if len(request.prompt) > 2000:
            raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="Prompt too long (max 2000 chars)")

        # Call Ollama API
        response = requests.post(
            f"{OLLAMA_API}/generate",
            json={
                "model": request.model,
                "prompt": request.prompt,
                "temperature": request.temperature,
                "top_p": request.top_p,
                "top_k": request.top_k,
                "num_predict": request.num_predict,
                "stream": False
            },
            timeout=60
        )

        if response.status_code != 200:
            logger.error(f"Ollama API error: {response.text}")
            raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail="Model inference failed")

        data = response.json()
        processing_time = (time.time() - start_time) * 1000

        logger.info(
            f"Generated response | "
            f"prompt_len={len(request.prompt)} | "
            f"response_len={len(data.get('response', ''))} | "
            f"time_ms={processing_time:.0f}"
        )

        return GenerateResponse(
            response=data.get("response", ""),
            model=request.model,
            created_at=datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),
            processing_time_ms=processing_time
        )

    except requests.exceptions.Timeout:
        logger.error("Ollama API timeout")
        raise HTTPException(status_code=504, detail="Request timeout")
    except Exception as e:
        logger.error(f"Unexpected error: {e}")
        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail="Internal server error")

@app.get("/models")
async def list_models():
    """List available models"""
    try:
        response = requests.get(f"{OLLAMA_API}/tags", timeout=5)
        return response.json()
    except Exception as e:
        logger.error(f"Failed to list models: {e}")
        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail="Failed to list models")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    import uvicorn
    uvicorn.run(app, host="0.0.0.0", port=8000)







  
  
  Create

title: I built a lightweight Football Manager alternative because I don't have time for heavy games
title_hi: I built a lightweight Football Manager alternative because I don't have time for heavy games
summary:
Hi guys, I am a web developer from China. 

Today I want to show you my side project: 38-0 League. It is a football (soc
content:
Hi guys, I am a web developer from China. 

Today I want to show you my side project: 38-0 League. It is a football (soccer) simulation game on web.

I used to play a lot of Football Manager. But now I have a full-time job, I don't have time to play 5 hours just for half season. Sometimes I just have a stupid idea in my head: "What if Arsenal play in La Liga?" or "What if Haaland play in League 2?".

So I write this game. You can custom teams, players, and just click one button. It will simulate 38 matches very fast.

Here is some technical problems I met and how I fix them. Maybe it can help you if you build similar things.


  
  
  1. Heavy Calculation in Browser


Because I have no money to buy strong backend server, all match simulation runs in user's browser.
Simulating 380 matches (20 teams play each other 2 times) is actually very fast in JS. The slow part is React rendering. At first, when I click "Simulate Season", the page freeze for 2 seconds. This is because I try to put all match logs and events into DOM state at same time.
Solution: I separate the logic and UI. The simulation function just return a big JSON object in memory. React only render the final League Table. The match details are lazy loaded. If you don't click the specific match, it never renders.


  
  
  2. Cheap Leaderboard using Cloudflare D1


I want a leaderboard so players can compete. But Redis or AWS RDS is too expensive for a free game. 
I try Cloudflare D1. It is serverless SQLite on edge. It is amazing!
I write a Cloudflare Worker to receive high score from client, check a simple secret token, and save to D1 database. The latency is very low because the worker runs near the user. And the free tier gives me 100,000 writes per day. Very enough for me.


  
  
  3. SEO for SPA (Multi-language)


This is my biggest headache. I use Vite + React. Google crawler don't like it. 
I want people from Spain or Brazil to find my game, so I need /es and /pt routes. I didn't use Next.js because I don't want to rewrite all my code. So I write a post-build Node script. 
After npm run build, the script copy index.html into many folders, and replace the <title> and <meta> tags with correct language text statically. It's a bit dirty hack, but Google Search Console finally start to index my pages!


  
  
  4. Ads vs PageSpeed


To pay the domain name, I put some Adsterra banners. But these ad scripts destroy my Core Web Vitals. My LCP and TBT become red in Lighthouse.


  
  
  How I fix: I delay the ad script. I use a simple event listener. Only when user scroll or move mouse, I append the ad <script> to document body. So Lighthouse sees a clean page, and real users still see the ads. Win-win.


If you like football, please try it here: 38-0.one
You can try the Sandbox mode to make your own crazy league. Let me know if you find bugs or have ideas! Thanks!

title: Unwrapping Aluminum Foil's Hidden Secrets
title_hi: अल्युमिनियम फॉयल के छिपे हुए राज
summary: Discover aluminum foil's hidden uses
content: Aluminum foil is a versatile kitchen essential with a multitude of uses. From cooking and baking to DIY hacks, it has been an indispensable part of our lives for over a century. First patented in 1845 by Hans Christian Oersted, aluminum foil became widely available after Charles Martin Hall's invention of the electrolytic process in 1886. It can be used for foil pack meals, keeping food warm, and grilling with ease.
content_hi: अल्युमिनियम फॉयल एक बहुमुखी किचन आवश्यकता है जिसके कई उपयोग हैं। खाना पकाने और बेकिंग से लेकर डीआईवाई हैक्स तक, यह एक शताब्दी से अधिक समय से हमारे जीवन का एक अभिन्न अंग रहा है। हांस क्रिस्चियन ओर्स्टेड द्वारा 1845 में पहली बार पेटेंट कराया गया, अल्युमिनियम फॉयल चार्ल्स मार्टिन हॉल के 1886 में विद्युत अपक्षयी प्रक्रिया के आविष्कार के बाद व्यापक रूप से उपलब्ध हो गया।

title: AI-Run Ransomware: Not Fully Autonomous

summary: AI-run ransomware attack not fully autonomous
content: A recent ransomware attack marked the first known instance of an AI agent executing the technical aspects of the attack. However, it has been revealed that human intervention was still necessary to choose the victim, set up the infrastructure, and provide stolen credentials. This discovery suggests that the attack was not entirely autonomous, contrary to initial reports. The AI agent's role was limited to carrying out the attack, while humans handled the planning and preparation stages.

title: ESA’s XMM-Newton and Galactic…
title_hi: ESA’s XMM-Newton and Galactic…
summary:
Originally published at norvik.tech



  
  
  Introduction


Explore how ESA's XMM-Newton telescope revises the distan
content:
Originally published at norvik.tech



  
  
  Introduction


Explore how ESA's XMM-Newton telescope revises the distance to the Milky Way's outer spiral arms, impacting technology and development.


  
  
  Understanding the XMM-Newton Discoveries


The European Space Agency's XMM-Newton and NASA's Chandra X-ray telescopes have made significant strides in measuring distances within the Milky Way. By capturing the echoes of three bright explosions, researchers have determined that the outer spiral arms of our galaxy are up to 10% further away than previously estimated. This advancement not only enhances our cosmic map but also has ramifications for various technologies.

[INTERNAL:espacio-exploracion|Exploration of Space Technology]


  
  
  The Mechanics Behind the Measurement


The measurement process involves sophisticated imaging techniques and data analysis. The telescopes capture X-ray emissions from supernova remnants, which act as markers in space. By analyzing these emissions, scientists can calculate distances based on light travel time. This process requires precise calibration of instruments and extensive data processing to ensure accuracy.


  
  
  The Importance of Accurate Galactic Measurements


Accurate measurements of galactic distances are crucial for multiple reasons. Firstly, they inform our understanding of the universe's structure and evolution. Secondly, they impact technologies that rely on precise astronomical data, such as satellite navigation systems and telecommunications.


  
  
  Impacts on Technology




Satellite Navigation: More accurate galactic maps help improve the precision of GPS systems by providing better data on satellite positioning.

Telecommunications: Understanding the spatial arrangement of celestial bodies can enhance satellite communication technologies, leading to clearer signals and improved connectivity.



  
  
  Use Cases in Technology Development


Various industries can leverage findings from XMM-Newton's discoveries. For instance, companies developing satellite technology can utilize improved distance measurements to enhance their systems' accuracy.


  
  
  Real-World Applications




Aerospace Engineering: Firms like Boeing and Airbus can refine their navigation systems using this data, improving flight safety and efficiency.

Telecom Providers: Companies such as Telefónica can optimize their satellite networks based on more accurate distance data, reducing latency and increasing bandwidth efficiency.



  
  
  Challenges in Galactic Measurement Techniques


Despite the advancements, challenges remain in measuring galactic distances. Factors such as cosmic dust, varying light sources, and instrument calibration pose significant hurdles.


  
  
  Technical Challenges




Cosmic Dust: Interstellar dust can obscure signals, making it difficult to obtain clear readings.

Calibration: Instruments must be meticulously calibrated to ensure that readings are accurate; any discrepancies can lead to incorrect conclusions.

This guide ranks every sit-stand desk you can actually buy in Singapore for under S$400, with live prices from the BuyWhere product API across Lazada, Shopee, Amazon SG, and local furniture retailers like Courts, IKEA, and Venture.

  What to look for under S$400


Three things matter more than brand at this price:



Lift mechanism (electric vs converter vs crank) — Electric desks (FlexiSpot E1 Pro) adjust with a button and hold 50-70kg. Converters (Ergotron, Songmics) sit on your existing desk and lift just the monitor + keyboard. Crank desks are manual and slow. For under S$400, electric is viable but expect a lighter-duty motor than premium S$800+ desks.

Stability at full height — The biggest weakness of budget standing desks is wobble at maximum extension. The Ergotron WorkFit-T (a converter) is rock-stable because it does not extend legs. Electric desks under S$400 will flex slightly at 110cm+ — fine for a laptop, noticeable for a 32-inch monitor.

Desktop size and cable management — A 120×60cm desktop fits a laptop and one monitor. 140×70cm fits dual monitors. Check the grommet hole and under-desk tray — budget desks often skip cable management, which means trailing wires at standing height.


Skip: desks with unbranded motors and no warranty (fail within 12-18 months), converters under S$100 (flex under monitor weight), and glass-top standing desks (fingerprints, cold, cannot clamp monitor arms).

  Best for specific needs


Best overall under S$400: FlexiSpot E1 Pro ($299) — Electric sit-stand with 4 memory presets, 50kg load capacity, 71-121cm range (suits 150-190cm users). The cheapest electric desk with a reliable motor and proper height range. Slight wobble at 115cm+ is normal at this price.

Best for stability (no wobble): Ergotron WorkFit-T ($399) — A converter, not a full desk, but zero leg-extension wobble. Holds two monitors + laptop (16kg) rock-steady. No assembly — place on your existing desk and lift. Ideal if you already have a good sitting desk.

Best budget converter: Songmics LBN06N ($159) — Gas-spring assist lifts 10kg (monitor + laptop) from 11 to 50cm. Cheapest converter that actually works for a single monitor setup. Not for dual monitors or heavy all-in-ones.

Best for dual monitors: FlexiSpot E1 Pro ($299) with 140×70cm upgrade — The 120×60cm standard top fits one monitor + laptop. Pay S$30-50 extra for the 140×70cm bamboo or chipboard top to fit dual monitors. The 50kg motor handles two monitors + a desktop PC easily.

Best for small spaces: Songmics LSN06N ($139) — Compact Z-frame converter (60×42cm) fits just a laptop and mouse. Lifts 10kg. Ideal for HDB study corners or co-living spaces where a full desk is not possible.

Best premium feel: IKEA BEKANT (used/refurb, $250-350) — Carousell and eBay Singapore often list lightly-used BEKANT desks from closed offices. T-leg design, 160×80cm top, very stable. Check the motor warranty — IKEA offers 10 years on new, but used units have no coverage.


  
  
  Where to buy standing desks in Singapore




FlexiSpot Official Store (Lazada LazMall) — E1 Pro at $299 with 5-year motor warranty. Ships from SG warehouse (2-3 days).

Shopee Mall (Ergotron SG, Siducal SG) — WorkFit-T converters and budget electric desks. Look for "Shopee Mall" guarantee.

Amazon SG — Vari, Mount-It!, Vivo, Songmics converters. Prime delivery within 1-2 days.

IKEA (Alexandra, Tampines, Jurong) — BEKANT ($449 new, over budget but worth comparing). ASKHYLLE table legs for DIY standing setups.

Courts / Best Denki — FlexiSpot and Siducal floor models. Useful for testing motor noise and wobble before buying.

Carousell — Used BEKANT and FlexiSpot desks from $200. Meet-up to test the motor before paying.


Always cross-check on BuyWhere before buying — the comparison API surfaces bundle deals (free chair mat, under-desk drawer) and flash sales across all channels.


  
  
  Common mistakes




Buying an electric desk with an unbranded motor. No-name electric desks under S$200 use motors that fail within 12-18 months of daily use. FlexiSpot and Siducal use rated motors with 3-5 year warranties. If the listing does not name the motor or offer a warranty, it is a risk.

Ignoring the height range. A desk that tops out at 105cm is too short for anyone over 175cm — you will hunch at standing height. Measure your elbow height standing (floor to elbow) and buy a desk that reaches at least 5cm above it. The FlexiSpot E1 Pro (121cm max) suits users up to 190cm.

Overloading a converter. Converters are rated for 10-16kg. Two 27-inch monitors on arms plus a desktop PC exceeds this. The Ergotron WorkFit-T (16kg) is the ceiling for converters — for more, buy a full electric desk.

Skipping the anti-fatigue mat. Standing on hard flooring for 4+ hours causes knee and lower-back pain. A S$30-50 anti-fatigue mat (IKEA KOLDBY, Amazon basics) is essential. Budget for it — it is not optional.

Standing all day. The health benefit of sit-stand desks comes from alternating, not standing constantly. Aim for a 1:2 ratio (1 hour standing, 2 hours sitting). The FlexiSpot E1 Pro's memory presets make switching effortless; manual converters (Songmics Z-frame) discourage switching because they are harder to adjust.

  FAQ


What is the best standing desk under S$400 in Singapore?
The FlexiSpot E1 Pro ($299) is the best electric standing desk under S$400 — 4 memory presets, 50kg load, 71-121cm height range. For maximum stability (no wobble), the Ergotron WorkFit-T converter ($399) is better but sits on your existing desk rather than replacing it.

Are standing desks under S$400 stable?
Electric desks under S$400 (FlexiSpot E1 Pro, Siducal) are stable up to about 110cm but will wobble slightly at maximum extension with a heavy monitor. Converters (Ergotron WorkFit-T) are more stable because they do not extend legs. If stability is critical, choose a converter or cap your standing height at 110cm.

Is it better to buy a standing desk or a converter?
A converter ($129-399) if you already have a good desk and want to spend less. A full electric desk ($229-299) if you are setting up a new workspace or want a larger surface. Converters are more stable but limit desktop space. Electric desks offer more room and easier height adjustment.

Do I need an anti-fatigue mat?
Yes. Standing on hard flooring for more than 30 minutes causes foot and knee fatigue. A S$30-50 anti-fatigue mat (IKEA KOLDBY, Amazon) reduces pressure on joints and is essential for any standing desk setup.

How long do budget electric desk motors last?
Branded motors (FlexiSpot, Siducal) last 5-10 years with normal use (3-5 height changes per day) and come with 3-5 year warranties. Unbranded motors in sub-S$200 desks often fail within 18 months. The motor is the single point of failure — buy a brand that names its motor and offers a warranty.

Where is the cheapest place to buy a standing desk in Singapore?
FlexiSpot's Lazada LazMall store for new electric desks (E1 Pro at $299 with warranty). Amazon SG for converters (Vari, Mount-It!, Songmics). Carousell for used IKEA BEKANT and FlexiSpot desks from $200 — always test the motor before buying.

  Best deal for your situation


Cheapest unlocked (no contract): Amazon SG ($1,649 for 256GB) — S$80 cheaper than the Apple Store. Ships with Apple's full 1-year warranty. Prime delivery within 1-2 days. Stock fluctuates — set a BuyWhere price alert.

Best with trade-in: M1 ($1,299 effective after trading iPhone 14 Pro) — M1's trade-in values are S$100-200 higher than Singtel and StarHub as of July 2026. Best for immediate pickup: Apple Store (Orchard Road, Jewel, Marina Bay Sands) — Full retail price ($1,729) but instant availability, engraving, and AppleCare+ upsell at point of sale. Best if you need the phone today and want zero risk.

Best for corporate/staff plans: Singtel / StarHub corporate plans — If your employer has a corporate telco tie-up, the iPhone 17 Pro can come with a S$200-400 device offset on a 2-year plan. Check with your HR before buying outright.

Best for AppleCare+ coverage: Apple Store — Buying direct lets you add AppleCare+ with Theft and Loss (S$349 for 2 years) at purchase. Third-party retailers sell the phone but cannot bundle Theft and Loss coverage — only Accidental Damage.


  
  
  Where to buy in detail




Apple Store Singapore (Orchard, Jewel, MBS) — Full retail price but zero risk, instant pickup, engraving, AppleCare+ with Theft and Loss. Best for peace of mind.

Amazon SG — Consistently the cheapest unlocked price ($1,649). Ships from and sold by Amazon SG. Full Apple warranty. Stock varies by colour and storage.

Shopee Mall (EpiCentre, Nubox, authorised) — Voucher-stacked pricing during sales events. Verify "Shopee Mall" badge for authenticity. Free accessories bundled.

Lazada LazMall — Similar pricing to Shopee Mall. Brand-official stores. Flexi-combo payment plans (3-12 months interest-free with UOB, DBS).

EpiCentre / iStudio ( authorised resellers) — Full retail price but physical stores for hands-on. Useful if you want to compare colours and storage in person.

Courts / Best Denki — Full retail price. Flexi-payment plans (Courts Flexi-MBME). Useful if you want 0% instalments over 24-36 months.

Singtel / M1 / StarHub — Telco contracts reduce upfront cost but lock you into a 2-year plan. Best if you need mobile service anyway. Compare plan value, not just device price.

Carousell (used) — S$1,200-1,400 for a mint 256GB unit with box and accessories. Meet at an Apple Store to verify the serial number and AppleCare status before paying. Avoid sealed-box sellers — these are often grey-market units without local warranty.


Always cross-check on BuyWhere before buying — the comparison API surfaces price drops and restocks across all channels within minutes.


  
  
  Common mistakes




Buying a "sealed" iPhone on Carousell or Facebook Marketplace. Sealed iPhones sold below retail are almost always grey-market imports (Hong Kong, Japan) or counterfeit boxes with fake phones inside. A genuine Singapore-warrantied iPhone sold by an individual will be opened and activated. Always verify the serial number at checkcoverage.apple.com before paying.

Comparing only the upfront device price on telco plans. A "$0 upfront" iPhone 17 Pro on a S$95/month plan costs S$2,280 over 2 years — S$551 more than buying unlocked from Amazon SG ($1,649) plus a S$35/month SIM-only plan (S$840 over 2 years). Always calculate the total cost of ownership (device + 24 months of plan fees).

Ignoring AppleCare+ with Theft and Loss. Singapore has one of the highest phone-theft rates in Asia. Replacing a stolen iPhone 17 Pro without coverage costs the full retail price (S$1,729). AppleCare+ with Theft and Loss (S$349 for 2 years) caps replacement at S$109. Only available if you buy from the Apple Store within 60 days of purchase.

Buying from an unauthorised Lazada/Shopee seller. Only buy from "Mall" or "Brand Official" stores. Third-party sellers may sell refurbished units sold as new, or units with non-local warranty. The price difference is S$10-30 — not worth the risk.

Waiting too long for the "best deal." iPhone prices drop S$80-150 between launch (September) and July, then stabilise until the September announcement. If you are buying in July-August 2026, prices will not drop further — buy now. The next meaningful drop is the September iPhone 18 launch, when the 17 Pro is discontinued.

Is it cheaper to buy iPhone 17 Pro from Amazon or the Apple Store?
Amazon SG is consistently S$80-120 cheaper than the Apple Store for outright unlocked purchases. Both include Apple's full 1-year warranty. The Apple Store's advantage is AppleCare+ with Theft and Loss (S$349), which Amazon cannot sell.

Should I buy iPhone 17 Pro on a telco plan?
Only if you need a mobile plan anyway. A "$0 upfront" deal on a S$95/month plan costs S$2,280 over 2 years. In Singapore, yes. AppleCare+ with Theft and Loss (S$349 for 2 years, Apple Store only) caps theft replacement at S$109. Without it, a stolen iPhone 17 Pro costs the full S$1,729 to replace.
